title: Radical Kenyan Fritter Cabbage Stir Fry
description: A hearty and flavorful stir fry dish combining the crunch of cabbage, the spiciness of radical kenyan peppers, and crispy fritters.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced radical kenyan peppers and cook until they start to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the shredded cabbage and cook until it starts to wilt, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the fritters to the skillet and stir to combine with the peppers and cabbage.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the fritters are crispy and the vegetables are tender.
